mapper.select: SELECT user_id, social_provider, social_id, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url, created_time, last_modified_time, is_social_login, persona_id, favorite_id, exp, gender, birth_date FROM users WHERE social_id = #{socialId} AND social_provider = #{socialProvider}

SELECT user_id, social_provider, social_id, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url, created_time, last_modified_time, is_social_login, persona_id, favorite_id, exp, gender, birth_date FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT user_id, social_provider, social_id, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url, created_time, last_modified_time, is_social_login, persona_id, favorite_id, exp, gender, birth_date FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ( (#{productType} = 'DEPOSIT' AND deposit_product_id = #{productId}) OR (#{productType} = 'SAVING' AND saving_product_id = #{productId}) OR (#{productType} = 'CARD' AND card_product_id = #{productId}) )
mapper.select: SELECT favorite_id AS favoriteId, user_id AS userId, deposit_product_id AS depositProductId, saving_product_id AS savingProductId, card_product_id AS cardProductId, created_time AS createdTime, last_modified_time AS lastModifiedTime FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT cp.card_product_id, cp.name, cp.card_image_url, cp.type, cp.issuer, cp.annual_fee, cp.pre_month_money,
cb.parsed_benefit_id, cb.card_id2, cb.title, cb.category, cb.benefit_type, cb.value, cb.condition_text, cb.max_benefit_monthly, cb.min_spend_per_transaction, cb.pre_month_money_specific, cb.description,
CASE WHEN uf.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isStarred,
COALESCE(lc.like_count, 0) AS likeCount,
CASE WHEN ul_self.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isLiked
FROM user_favorites uf JOIN card_product cp ON uf.card_product_id = cp.card_product_id LEFT JOIN card_parsed_benefit cb ON cp.card_product_id = cb.card_id2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ul.card_id2 AS card_product_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM user_likes ul GROUP BY ul.card_id2 ) lc ON lc.card_product_id = cp.card_product_id -- ← alias에 맞춤
LEFT JOIN user_likes ul_self ON ul_self.card_id2 = cp.card_product_id AND ul_self.user_id = #{userId} /* 타입 컬럼이 있다면 AND ul_self.product_type = 'CARD' */ WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.card_product_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT s.saving_product_id AS savingId, s.kor_co_nm AS bankName, s.fin_prdt_nm AS savingName, MAX(o.intr_rate) AS basicRate, MAX(o.intr_rate2) AS maxRate, s.max_limit AS maxLimit, CASE WHEN f.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isStarred, COALESCE(lc.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, CASE WHEN ul_self.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isLiked FROM user_favorites f JOIN saving_product s ON f.saving_product_id = s.saving_product_id JOIN saving_option o ON s.fin_prdt_cd = o.fin_prdt_cd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ul.saving_product_id AS saving_product_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM user_likes ul WHERE ul.saving_product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ul.saving_product_id ) lc ON lc.saving_product_id = s.saving_product_id LEFT JOIN user_likes ul_self ON ul_self.saving_product_id = s.saving_product_id AND ul_self.user_id = #{userId} WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.saving_product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.saving_product_id

SELECT d.deposit_product_id AS depositId, d.kor_co_nm AS bankName, d.fin_prdt_nm AS productName, MAX(o.intr_rate) AS basicRate, MAX(o.intr_rate2) AS maxRate, CASE WHEN f.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isStarred, COALESCE(lc.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, CASE WHEN ul_self.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isLiked FROM user_favorites f JOIN deposit_product d ON f.deposit_product_id = d.deposit_product_id JOIN deposit_option o ON d.fin_prdt_cd = o.fin_prdt_cd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ul.deposit_product_id AS deposit_product_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM user_likes ul WHERE ul.deposit_product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ul.deposit_product_id ) lc ON lc.deposit_product_id = d.deposit_product_id LEFT JOIN user_likes ul_self ON ul_self.deposit_product_id = d.deposit_product_id AND ul_self.user_id = #{userId} WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.deposit_product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.deposit_product_id

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT dp.kor_co_nm AS bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS product_name, dp.etc_note AS etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2 FROM user_favorites uf JOIN deposit_product dp ON uf.deposit_product_id = dp.deposit_product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, save_trm AS max_save_trm, intr_rate AS max_intr_rate, intr_rate2 AS max_intr_rate2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY CASE WHEN save_trm = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, save_trm DESC ) AS rn FROM deposit_option ) tmp WHERE rn = 1 ) opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 3 ) AS random_deposit

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT sp.saving_product_id AS id, sp.kor_co_nm AS company, sp.fin_prdt_nm AS title, opt.intr_rate AS base_rate, opt.intr_rate2 AS max_rate, opt.save_trm AS period, sp.max_limit AS amount, fc.company_image AS company_image, TRUE AS is_starred FROM user_favorites uf JOIN saving_product sp ON uf.saving_product_id = sp.saving_product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY CASE WHEN save_trm = 12 THEN 1 WHEN save_trm = 6 THEN 2 WHEN save_trm = 1 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ) AS rn FROM saving_option ) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) opt ON sp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd LEFT JOIN financial_companies fc ON sp.kor_co_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', fc.kor_co_nm, '%') WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 3 ) AS random_saving

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.card_product_id AS id, c.name AS name, c.type AS type, c.card_image_url AS imageUrl, c.issuer_id AS issuer, c.annual_fee AS annualFee, c.pre_month_money AS preMonthMoney FROM user_favorites uf JOIN card_product c ON uf.card_product_id = c.card_product_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 3 ) AS random_card
SELECT name_ko AS nameKo, quote AS quote, image_url AS imageUrl FROM persona_types WHERE persona_id = ( SELECT persona_id FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} )
